message:
Mobile layout polish: fix horizontal overflow on /honest and /playground

iPhone-width audit (375 px viewport, headless Chromium) showed two
overflows:

  /honest.html       scrollWidth 443 vs viewport 375 — the 5-column
                     comparison table was wider than the page on
                     phones. Made table.cmp scroll horizontally
                     within itself (display: block + overflow-x: auto)
                     so it can't push the page off-screen.

  /playground.html   scrollWidth 381 vs viewport 375 — the egress-
                     savings sentence in the summary box wrapped a
                     long unbreakable token. Added overflow-wrap:
                     anywhere + word-break: break-word so long
                     "X.XX GB/hour" / "$YY/month" tokens break inside
                     instead of pushing the page wider.

Re-audited: all four pages (/, /playground, /honest, /rpc) now fit
within the 375 px viewport with no horizontal overflow.
